page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a resource density of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, but it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core performance. The instance achieves top-tier results in multi-threaded workloads, including stress-ng multi-core CPU tests, Geekbench multi-core benchmarks, and PassMark CPU tests. It also demonstrates high throughput in static web serving at 42.57 GB/sec and strong performance in database operations and software compilation. Single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth tests fall within the average range.

Given its dedicated 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high-throughput networking, this instance offers high resource density for compute-bound workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is well-suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, static web serving, and database operations. The lack of bundled local storage requires external block storage attachment, which should be factored into the overall architectural design.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, this KVM-based server provides a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio, 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage or GPU hardware. Benchmarks show strong multi-core capabilities, with top-tier performance in multi-threaded decompression, software compilation, static web serving, and database operations. Conversely, single-core performance and uncached memory bandwidth remain in the average tier. This hardware profile is highly efficient for compute-intensive, multi-threaded workloads such as web serving, compilation, and database management, though users must provision external storage.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7t.16xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 128 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for databases and web serving.

tagline: A dedicated 64-core compute-optimized instance delivering strong multi-threaded performance and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: Dedicated 64-core Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz
128.0 GB RAM providing a compute-optimized 2.0 GB per core ratio
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
Strong multi-core performance in software compilation and database operations
Requires external block storage as no local storage is bundled
